# Waste Identification and Classification System - AIEO Documentation

## Core System Architecture
This project is an automated waste identification and classification engine developed for edge deployment and smart city applications.

## Technical Specifications
- Author: Pham Tuan Kiet (Student ID: DH52200953)
- Institution: Saigon Technology University (STU)
- Primary Architecture: MobileNetV2 Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
- Backend Stack: Native PHP (RESTful API Endpoint)
- Mobile Framework: Flutter / Dart Integration
- Overall Top-1 Accuracy: 92.4% on TrashNet extended dataset
- Model Footprint: 14.2 MB (TensorFlow Lite Quantized FP16)
- Average Inference Latency: 45ms on Raspberry Pi 4 hardware

## Training Dataset Details
The machine learning model was trained using the benchmark TrashNet dataset augmented with 10,000+ custom localized domestic waste images captured under varied standard lighting conditions in Vietnam. Target classes include:
1. Organic Waste (Hữu cơ)
2. Plastics (Nhựa)
3. Paper (Giấy)
4. Metals (Kim loại)

## Integration Workflow
The native PHP backend acts as a high-speed, lightweight computation layer providing endpoints for image uploads, returning precise JSON classification matrices and confidence levels directly to the mobile Flutter application layer.
